headline: Chief Commercial Officer @ AllUnite.com | Executive Master International Business
summary:
Innovation advocate that works in startups and scale-ups, supporting them with communication and commercialization of ideas and building and leading a creative force of marketing and commercial multicultural departments. I find strength in diversity, freedom of ideas, and openness to creative insight.

Currently leading the commercial team in a global ad tech platform AllUnite (bringing innovative tech into traditional industries, one of them - the most creative marketing medium - Out of home). Our clients and partners are international giants and opinion leaders in OOH, CRE, and Retail industries.

Previously, co-founded a Business and HR Consultancy agency for startups. I've accumulated 9-year experience leading distributed, international teams, hired 120+ commercial talent, and collected the best practices in innovative HR, organization design, and digital transformation for my clients to perform, innovate and thrive in the digital age.

experiences.title: Chief Commercial Officer
experiences.description:
AllUnite is a global advertising technology platform that enables advertising companies and media agencies to effectively measure, forecast, and target audiences in real-time.

AllUnite is a turn-key adtech solution for audience measurement out-of-home (OOH): in stores, cinemas, airports, shopping centres, railway stations, or many more.

The company provides hardware and technology for data collection, processing, and analysis.

experiences.title: HR & Business Consulting in Marketing & Creative
experiences.description:
- Talent acquisition of remote talent in Marketing and Creative 
- Contract negotiation and logistics around remote contractors
- Organizational design and Project management to integrate remote teams into companies and agencies

experiences.title: Head of Marketing & Talent Experience
experiences.description:
Nobel Coaching & Tutoring is a fully-remote, US-based platform that provides online coaching and tutoring opportunities to students and whole families with learning challenges, including learning disabilities and ADHD.

- Marketing: Brand development for 4 sub-products and internal branding; development of digital marketing and content strategy, influencer's marketing
- Talent Experience: Development & execution of Agile recruitment strategy for all levels of organizations (grew 5 to 50 remote talent within a year)

experiences.title: National Director of Talent Management
experiences.description:
AIESEC Italia is a student-run non-governmental organization and a global platform for young people to develop their leadership potential through international internships and volunteer opportunities.

Key responsibilities and achievements:
- Development of HR strategy at the national scope (800+ students volunteering members)
- Development and delivery on national Recruitment strategy in 19 local offices all around Italy in the biggest universities (with a result of 408 new volunteers in Fall, and 344 new volunteers in Spring), including targeted promotion online and on-campus
- Development and delivery Learning & Development and Leadership Programs (for 800+ members and 250+ leaders)
- Development and implementation of Performance management system through Gamification scheme based on KPIs, MoS, and professional development of members
- Trainer and facilitator at four national conferences (with 250+ attendees), delivered together with PwC, Kaplan, and others

volunteer_work.title: Volunteer in international social impact projects in Lithuania and Italy
volunteer_work.description: On issues of cross-cultural education, empowering the local community, entrepreneurship and leadership development of youth

recommendations:
Andrew Sachs

Kristina is an incredible leader and manager with outstanding technical competence in talent management, marketing and project management.

Nadja Ndayara

Kristina and I worked for 2 years, and throughout that time not only has she been my manager, but also a mentor and a dear friend! Kristina has the ability to lead a team professionally, while establishing a friendly atmosphere, and help everyone learn, develop, grow and face any challenge confidently. Shes always (at least) one step ahead providing innovative solutions and making an irreplaceable part of every company.
